title: Legalite Advisors, Xander Law, GameChanger Law act on e-TRNL Energy seed fundraise
description: e-TRNL Energy has raised ₹27.4 crore from a seed fundraise led by IAN Group, with support from Navam Capital, Anicut Capital, and existing investors Speciale Invest, Micelio, IIMA Ventures.Legalite Advisors advised e-TRNL Energy on this fundraise. The Firm provided end-to-end legal advisory and transaction support to the Company and its founders including structuring, drafting, negotiating the transaction documents and assisting through to successful completion of the round.The transaction team
